```{r prevalent_forest_helpers}
         plot.margin = unit(c(12, 12, 6, 0), "pt"), legend.position = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
  
  p_table + p_forest + plot_layout(widths = c(table_width_ratio, 2))
}

```

## Sensitivity Analysis: Time Windows

```{r prevalent_sensitivity_setup}
prevalent_time_windows <- c(5, 10)

build_prevalent_time_window <- function(disease_var, disease_date_var, years_back) {
  delta <- as.difftime(round(years_back * 365.25), units = "days")
  twins_analysis |>
    filter(
      (!!sym(disease_var) == 0 | is.na(!!sym(disease_var))) |
      (!!sym(disease_var) == 1 & !is.na(!!sym(disease_date_var)) & 
       !!sym(disease_date_var) <= checkdate & 
       !!sym(disease_date_var) >= checkdate - delta)
    ) |>
    mutate(
      prevalent_disease = case_when(
        !!sym(disease_var) == 1 & !is.na(!!sym(disease_date_var)) & 
        !!sym(disease_date_var) <= checkdate & 
        !!sym(disease_date_var) >= checkdate - delta ~ 1,
        TRUE ~ 0
      )
    )
}
```

```{r prevalent_sensitivity_analyses}
sensitivity_results <- map(prevalent_time_windows, function(tw) {
  cat("\n=== Analyzing", tw, "year time window ===\n")
  
  # Check eligible diseases for this window
  elig_diseases <- map_dfr(names(diseases_config), function(d) {
    sp <- diseases_config[[d]]
    delta <- as.difftime(round(tw * 365.25), units = "days")
    n_prev <- twins_analysis |>
      filter(
        !!sym(sp$var) == 1, !is.na(!!sym(sp$date)),
        !!sym(sp$date) <= checkdate,
        !!sym(sp$date) >= checkdate - delta
      ) |>
      nrow()
    tibble(disease = d, n_cases = n_prev, eligible = n_prev >= min_prevalent_cases)
  }) |>
    filter(eligible) |>
    pull(disease)
  
  if (length(elig_diseases) == 0) {
    cat("No eligible diseases for", tw, "year window\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("Eligible diseases:", length(elig_diseases), "\n")
  
  # Run analyses for eligible diseases
  results <- map(elig_diseases, function(disease_name) {
    sp <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
    prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(sp$var, sp$date, tw)
    analyze_prevalent_disease_univariate(prev_data, sp$name, organ_age_mortality, "mortality")
  }) |> set_names(elig_diseases)
  
  # Combine and add FDR
  all_results <- bind_rows(results, .id = "disease_key") |>
    mutate(
      model_type = "logistic",
      outcome_type = "prevalent_disease",
      disease = disease_key,
      time_window = tw
    ) |>
    group_by(disease, analysis_type, model) |>
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr")) |>
    ungroup()
  
  return(all_results)
}) |> set_names(paste0(prevalent_time_windows, "y"))

sensitivity_results <- compact(sensitivity_results)
```

```{r create_prevalent_heatmap_function}
create_prevalent_heatmap <- function(data, group_name) {
  group_data <- data |> filter(outcome_group %in% group_name)
  if (nrow(group_data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  all_organs <- unique(group_data$predictor) |> na.omit()
  organ_order <- c(intersect(fixed_organ_order, all_organs), setdiff(all_organs, fixed_organ_order))
  
  group_matrix <- group_data |>
    select(outcome, predictor, effect_size) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = predictor, values_from = effect_size, values_fill = 0) |>
    column_to_rownames("outcome") |>
    as.matrix()
  
  outcome_order <- if (nrow(group_matrix) > 1) {
    rownames(group_matrix)[hclust(dist(group_matrix), method = "ward.D2")$order]
  } else {
    rownames(group_matrix)
  }
  
  predictor_order <- intersect(organ_order, colnames(group_matrix))
  
  if (length(outcome_order) == 0 || length(predictor_order) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Panel-style control variables
  text_size_pt <- HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE
  square_size <- text_size_pt / HEATMAP_SQUARE_SIZE_DIVISOR
  
  group_data_plot <- group_data |>
    mutate(
      outcome = factor(outcome, levels = outcome_order),
      predictor = factor(predictor, levels = predictor_order),
      outcome_num = (as.numeric(outcome) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      predictor_num = (as.numeric(predictor) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      effect_size_colored = if_else(impossible, NA_real_, if_else(significance != "", effect_size, NA_real_)),
      non_sig_marker = if_else(impossible, "", if_else(significance == "", "×", ""))
    )
  
  # Calculate dynamic limits (white-to-red only, no negative values)
  effect_range <- range(group_data$effect_size, na.rm = TRUE)
  buffer <- 0.1
  max_limit <- max(1.5, effect_range[2] + buffer)
  min_limit <- 0  # Start from 0 since no negative values
  
  breaks <- seq(0, max_limit, length.out = 4)
  labels <- sprintf("%.1f", breaks)
  
  ggplot(group_data_plot, aes(x = predictor_num, y = outcome_num, fill = effect_size_colored)) +
    geom_tile(width = square_size, height = square_size, color = NA) +
    geom_text(aes(x = predictor_num, y = outcome_num, label = non_sig_marker), size = 5.5, color = "darkgrey", family = "Helvetica", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colors = c(
        "white",        # Start at 0
        "#C64D4D",      # Red (mid-high)
        "#B71C1C"       # Darker red (extreme high)
      ),
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, max_limit * 0.5, max_limit)),
      limits = c(0, max_limit),
      na.value = "white",
      name = "log(Odds\nRatio)",
      breaks = breaks,
      labels = labels
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(predictor_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = predictor_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(predictor_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(outcome_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = outcome_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(outcome_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Helvetica", color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, hjust = 0, margin = margin(r = 10), color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm")
    ) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1, expand = FALSE)
}
```

```{r prevalent_sensitivity_heatmaps}
sensitivity_heatmaps <- map(names(sensitivity_results), function(window_name) {
  tw <- as.numeric(gsub("y", "", window_name))
  results <- sensitivity_results[[window_name]]
  
  # Prepare heatmap data
  heatmap_data <- results |>
    filter(analysis_type == "univariate", model == "mortality") |>
    mutate(
      outcome_raw = disease,
      outcome = case_when(
        disease == "Diabetes" ~ "Diabetes",
        disease == "Dementia" ~ "Dementia",
        disease == "Parkinson" ~ "Parkinson",
        disease == "Ischemic heart disease" ~ "Ischemic Heart Disease",
        disease == "Atrial fibrillation" ~ "Atrial Fibrillation",
        disease == "Cerebrovascular disease" ~ "Cerebrovascular Disease",
        disease == "Heart failure" ~ "Heart Failure",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(str_replace_all(disease, "_", " "))
      ),
      predictor = case_when(
        predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        predictor == "Artery" ~ "Arterial",
        predictor == "Immune" ~ "Immune",
        predictor == "Vessel" ~ "Vessel",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
      ),
      effect_size = log(odds_ratio),
      impossible = case_when(
        outcome %in% c("Breast Cancer", "Ovarian Cancer") & predictor == "Prostate" ~ TRUE,
        outcome == "Prostate Cancer" & predictor == "Ovary" ~ TRUE,
        TRUE ~ FALSE
      ),
      significance = case_when(
        impossible ~ "",
        FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      outcome_group = if_else(str_detect(outcome, "cancer|Cancer"), "Cancer", "Non-Cancer Diseases"),
      model_type = "logistic"
    ) |>
    select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type, impossible) |>
    clean_names()
  
  # Create heatmap
  heatmap <- create_prevalent_heatmap(heatmap_data, c("Non-Cancer Diseases", "Cancer"))
  
  # Save heatmap
  if (!is.null(heatmap)) {
    filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "main", paste0(tw, "y"), 
                         "mortality_organ_age_heatmap_combined.svg")
    save_plot(filepath, heatmap, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved heatmap for", tw, "year window\n")
  }
  
  return(heatmap)
}) |> set_names(names(sensitivity_results))
```

```{r prevalent_sensitivity_forest_tables}
sensitivity_forest_tables <- map(names(sensitivity_results), function(window_name) {
  tw <- as.numeric(gsub("y", "", window_name))
  results <- sensitivity_results[[window_name]]
  
  # Get unique diseases in this window
  diseases_in_window <- unique(results$disease)
  
  # Create forest tables for each disease
  forest_plots <- map(diseases_in_window, function(disease_name) {
    disease_data <- results |> 
      filter(disease == disease_name, analysis_type == "univariate", model == "mortality")
    
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    create_prevalent_forest_table(
      data = results,
      disease_name = disease_name,
      analysis_type = "univariate",
      model_type = "mortality",
      time_window = tw
    )
  }) |> set_names(diseases_in_window)
  
  forest_plots <- compact(forest_plots)
  
  # Save forest tables
  for (disease_name in names(forest_plots)) {
    disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
    display_name <- if (!is.null(disease_config)) disease_config$name else disease_name
    
    filename <- paste0("prevalent_forest_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), ".svg")
    filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "main", paste0(tw, "y"), filename)
    
    save_plot(filepath, forest_plots[[disease_name]], width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  }
  
  # Create CSV tables directory for this time window
  csv_dir_prevalent <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "main", paste0(tw, "y"), "tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir_prevalent, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Save table data as CSV for prevalent disease
  for (disease_name in names(forest_plots)) {
    disease_data <- results |> 
      filter(disease == disease_name, analysis_type == "univariate", model == "mortality")
    
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    
    tab <- disease_data |>
      mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(odds_ratio), abs(ci_lower), abs(ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        or_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper)),
        Organ_Display = case_when(
          predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
          predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
          TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
        )
      ) |>
      select(Organ = Organ_Display, `OR (95% CI)` = or_formatted, FDR)
    
    disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
    display_name <- if (!is.null(disease_config)) disease_config$name else disease_name
    filename <- paste0("prevalent_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), ".csv")
    write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_prevalent, filename), row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  cat("Saved", length(forest_plots), "forest tables for", tw, "year window\n")
  
  return(forest_plots)
}) |> set_names(names(sensitivity_results))

cat("\n=== Sensitivity Analysis Summary ===\n")
cat("Time windows analyzed:", paste(prevalent_time_windows, "years"), "\n")
cat("Total heatmaps saved:", length(compact(sensitivity_heatmaps)), "\n")
cat("Total forest tables saved:", sum(map_int(sensitivity_forest_tables, length)), "\n")
```

## Within-Pair Analyses: Discordant Twins

```{r prevalent_discordant_setup}
min_discordant_pairs <- nrow(twins_analysis)*0.005

check_discordant_pairs <- function(prevalent_data, disease_name, mz_only = FALSE) {
  n_pairs <- prevalent_data |>
    group_by(pair_id) |>
    filter(
      n() == 2,
      if (mz_only) all(bestzyg == 1) else TRUE,
      sum(prevalent_disease == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == 1
    ) |>
    ungroup() |>
    summarise(n_pairs = n_distinct(pair_id)) |>
    pull(n_pairs)
  
  return(n_pairs)
}

run_prevalent_discordant <- function(prevalent_data, predictor_df, disease_name, mz_only = FALSE) {
  predictors <- setdiff(colnames(predictor_df), "twin_id")
  
  discordant_twins <- prevalent_data |>
    group_by(pair_id) |>
    filter(
      n() == 2,
      if (mz_only) all(bestzyg == 1) else TRUE,
      sum(prevalent_disease == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == 1
    ) |>
    ungroup()
  
  # Apply sex filtering for sex-specific diseases
  if (grepl("prostate", disease_name, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    discordant_twins <- discordant_twins |> filter(sex == 1)
  } else if (grepl("breast|ovarian", disease_name, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    discordant_twins <- discordant_twins |> filter(sex == 2)
  }
  
  map_dfr(predictors, function(pred) {
    df <- discordant_twins |>
      left_join(predictor_df |> select(twin_id, all_of(pred)), by = "twin_id") |>
      filter(!is.na(.data[[pred]]))
    
    if (pred %in% c("Ovary", "Prostate")) {
      df <- df |> filter(sex == if (pred == "Ovary") 2 else 1)
    }
    
    if (n_distinct(df$pair_id) < 3) {
      return(tibble(
        disease = disease_name, predictor = pred, estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_,
        p_value = NA_real_, odds_ratio = NA_real_, ci_lower = NA_real_, ci_upper = NA_real_,
        n_pairs = NA_integer_, model = "mortality", analysis_type = "within_pair"
      ))
    }
    
    tryCatch({
      fit <- clogit(as.formula(paste0("prevalent_disease ~ scale(`", pred, "`) + strata(pair_id)")), data = df)
      est <- as.numeric(coef(fit)[1])
      se <- sqrt(diag(vcov(fit)))[1]
      p <- summary(fit)$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"]
      
      tibble(
        disease = disease_name,
        predictor = pred,
        estimate = est,
        std_error = se,
        p_value = as.numeric(p),
        odds_ratio = exp(est),
        ci_lower = exp(est - 1.96 * se),
        ci_upper = exp(est + 1.96 * se),
        n_pairs = n_distinct(df$pair_id),
        model = "mortality",
        analysis_type = "within_pair"
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      tibble(
        disease = disease_name, predictor = pred, estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_,
        p_value = NA_real_, odds_ratio = NA_real_, ci_lower = NA_real_, ci_upper = NA_real_,
        n_pairs = NA_integer_, model = "mortality", analysis_type = "within_pair"
      )
    })
  }) |>
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr"))
}
```

```{r prevalent_discordant_time_windows}
cat("\n=== Checking Discordant Pairs: Time Windows ===\n")

time_window_discordant <- map(prevalent_time_windows, function(tw) {
  cat("\n--- Time window:", tw, "years ---\n")
  
  # Check eligibility for all pairs
  eligible_all <- map_dfr(names(diseases_config), function(disease_name) {
    spec <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
    prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(spec$var, spec$date, tw)
    n_pairs <- check_discordant_pairs(prev_data, spec$name, mz_only = FALSE)
    tibble(disease = disease_name, n_pairs = n_pairs, eligible = n_pairs >= min_discordant_pairs)
  }) |> filter(eligible) |> pull(disease)
  
  # Check eligibility for MZ pairs
  eligible_mz <- map_dfr(names(diseases_config), function(disease_name) {
    spec <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
    prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(spec$var, spec$date, tw)
    n_pairs <- check_discordant_pairs(prev_data, spec$name, mz_only = TRUE)
    tibble(disease = disease_name, n_pairs = n_pairs, eligible = n_pairs >= min_discordant_pairs)
  }) |> filter(eligible) |> pull(disease)
  
  cat("Eligible (all pairs):", length(eligible_all), "| Eligible (MZ pairs):", length(eligible_mz), "\n")
  
  results <- list()
  
  # All pairs
  if (length(eligible_all) > 0) {
    results$all <- map(eligible_all, function(disease_name) {
      spec <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
      prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(spec$var, spec$date, tw)
      run_prevalent_discordant(prev_data, organ_age_mortality, spec$name, mz_only = FALSE)
    }) |> set_names(eligible_all) |>
      bind_rows(.id = "disease_key") |>
      mutate(model_type = "conditional_logistic", outcome_type = "prevalent_disease", 
             pair_type = "all", time_window = tw)
  }
  
  # MZ pairs
  if (length(eligible_mz) > 0) {
    results$mz <- map(eligible_mz, function(disease_name) {
      spec <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
      prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(spec$var, spec$date, tw)
      run_prevalent_discordant(prev_data, organ_age_mortality, spec$name, mz_only = TRUE)
    }) |> set_names(eligible_mz) |>
      bind_rows(.id = "disease_key") |>
      mutate(model_type = "conditional_logistic", outcome_type = "prevalent_disease", 
             pair_type = "mz", time_window = tw)
  }
  
  return(results)
}) |> set_names(paste0(prevalent_time_windows, "y"))
```

```{r create_discordant_heatmaps}
create_discordant_heatmap_data <- function(results_data) {
  results_data |>
    mutate(
      outcome = case_when(
        disease == "Diabetes" ~ "Diabetes",
        disease == "Dementia" ~ "Dementia",
        disease == "Parkinson" ~ "Parkinson",
        disease == "Ischemic heart disease" ~ "Ischemic Heart Disease",
        disease == "Atrial fibrillation" ~ "Atrial Fibrillation",
        disease == "Cerebrovascular disease" ~ "Cerebrovascular Disease",
        disease == "Heart failure" ~ "Heart Failure",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(str_replace_all(disease, "_", " "))
      ),
      predictor = case_when(
        predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        predictor == "Artery" ~ "Arterial",
        predictor == "Immune" ~ "Immune",
        predictor == "Vessel" ~ "Vessel",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
      ),
      effect_size = log(odds_ratio),
      impossible = case_when(
        outcome %in% c("Breast Cancer", "Ovarian Cancer") & predictor == "Prostate" ~ TRUE,
        outcome == "Prostate Cancer" & predictor == "Ovary" ~ TRUE,
        TRUE ~ FALSE
      ),
      significance = case_when(
        impossible ~ "",
        FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      outcome_group = if_else(str_detect(outcome, "cancer|Cancer"), "Cancer", "Non-Cancer Diseases"),
      model_type = "conditional_logistic"
    ) |>
    select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type, impossible) |>
    clean_names()
}

# Create and save heatmaps for time windows
for (window_name in names(time_window_discordant)) {
  tw_data <- time_window_discordant[[window_name]]
  
  if (!is.null(tw_data$all) && nrow(tw_data$all) > 0) {
    heatmap_data <- create_discordant_heatmap_data(tw_data$all)
    heatmap <- create_prevalent_heatmap(heatmap_data, c("Non-Cancer Diseases", "Cancer"))
    if (!is.null(heatmap)) {
      filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "within", window_name, "all_pairs_heatmap.svg")
      save_plot(filepath, heatmap, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(tw_data$mz) && nrow(tw_data$mz) > 0) {
    heatmap_data <- create_discordant_heatmap_data(tw_data$mz)
    heatmap <- create_prevalent_heatmap(heatmap_data, c("Non-Cancer Diseases", "Cancer"))
    if (!is.null(heatmap)) {
      filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "within", window_name, "mz_pairs_heatmap.svg")
      save_plot(filepath, heatmap, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r create_discordant_forest_function}
create_discordant_forest <- function(data, disease_name, n_pairs, pair_type_label) {
  forest_data <- data |> filter(disease == disease_name)
  if (nrow(forest_data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
  display_name <- if (!is.null(disease_config)) disease_config$name else disease_name
  title <- paste0(display_name, " - ", pair_type_label, " (", n_pairs, " discordant pairs)")
  
  forest_data <- forest_data |>
    mutate(
      or = odds_ratio, or_lower = ci_lower, or_upper = ci_upper,
      fdr = FDR, significant = FDR < 0.05,
      errorbar_color = if_else(FDR < 0.05, "grey30", "gray80"),
      Organ_Display = case_when(
        predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder", TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
      )
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(odds_ratio)) |>
    mutate(y_pos = rev(seq_along(predictor)), Organ_Display = factor(Organ_Display, levels = Organ_Display))
  
  x_min <- suppressWarnings(min(forest_data$or_lower, na.rm = TRUE))
  x_max <- suppressWarnings(max(forest_data$or_upper, na.rm = TRUE))
  default_lower <- 0.5
  default_upper <- 1.5
  
  if (!is.finite(x_min) || !is.finite(x_max) || x_min <= 0) {
    x_min <- default_lower
    x_max <- default_upper
  }
  
  pad <- 0.1 * (x_max - x_min)
  if (!is.finite(pad) || pad <= 0) pad <- 0.1
  
  x_limits <- c(min(default_lower, max(0.1, x_min - pad)), max(default_upper, x_max + pad))
  legend_x_left <- x_limits[1] + 0.05 * (x_limits[2] - x_limits[1])
  legend_x_right <- x_limits[1] + 0.55 * (x_limits[2] - x_limits[1])
  
  tab <- forest_data |>
    transmute(
      y_pos, `Organ age` = Organ_Display,
      `OR (95% CI)` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", or, or_lower, or_upper),
      FDR = sprintf("%.2e", fdr)
    )
  
  x_pos <- tibble(col = c("Organ age", "OR (95% CI)", "FDR"), x = c(1.0, 3.5, 6.0))
  table_long <- tab |> pivot_longer(-y_pos, names_to = "col", values_to = "val") |> left_join(x_pos, by = "col")
  
  p_table <- ggplot(table_long, aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = val)) +
    geom_text(hjust = c(0, 0, 1)[match(table_long$col, x_pos$col)], size = 3.2) +
    geom_text(data = x_pos |> mutate(y_pos = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1), 
             aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = col), hjust = c(0, 0, 1), fontface = "bold", 
             inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3.3) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, labels = NULL, limits = c(0.5, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 7.0), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.1, size = 12), axis.title = element_blank(),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(),
         plot.margin = unit(c(12, 6, 6, 6), "pt"))
  
  p_forest <- ggplot(forest_data, aes(y = y_pos)) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = y_pos - 0.5, ymax = y_pos + 0.5, 
                 fill = factor(seq_along(predictor) %% 2)), alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "transparent", "1" = "gray95")) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = 0.5, yend = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 0.75), 
                linetype = "33", color = "grey10", size = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbarh(data = forest_data, aes(xmin = or_lower, xmax = or_upper, y = y_pos), color = forest_data$errorbar_color, height = 0.15, size = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(x = or, color = significant), size = 2.5, shape = 16) +
    annotate("text", x = legend_x_left, y = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5, 
            label = "● Significant (FDR < 0.05)", hjust = 0.35, size = 3, color = "black") +
    annotate("text", x = legend_x_right, y = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5, 
            label = "● Non-significant", hjust = -0.65, size = 3, color = "gray80") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "black", "FALSE" = "gray80")) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, labels = NULL, limits = c(0.2, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    labs(x = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
         axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10), panel.grid = element_blank(),
         plot.margin = unit(c(12, 12, 6, 0), "pt"), legend.position = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
  
  p_table + p_forest + plot_layout(widths = c(2.5, 2))
}

# Forest tables for time windows
for (window_name in names(time_window_discordant)) {
  tw_data <- time_window_discordant[[window_name]]
  
  if (!is.null(tw_data$all) && nrow(tw_data$all) > 0) {
    diseases_to_plot <- unique(tw_data$all$disease_key)
    for (disease_key_name in diseases_to_plot) {
      disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_key_name]]
      years_back <- as.numeric(str_remove(window_name, "y"))
      prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(disease_config$var, disease_config$date, years_back)
      counts <- calculate_prevalent_discordant_counts(prev_data, disease_config$name, mz_only = FALSE)
      plot_data <- tw_data$all |> filter(disease_key == disease_key_name) |> mutate(cases = counts$cases)
      plot <- create_discordant_forest(plot_data, disease_config$name, counts$n_pairs, "All Pairs")
      if (!is.null(plot)) {
        display_name <- disease_config$name
        filename <- paste0("forest_all_pairs_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), ".svg")
        filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "within", window_name, filename)
        save_plot(filepath, plot, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(tw_data$mz) && nrow(tw_data$mz) > 0) {
    diseases_to_plot <- unique(tw_data$mz$disease_key)
    for (disease_key_name in diseases_to_plot) {
      disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_key_name]]
      years_back <- as.numeric(str_remove(window_name, "y"))
      prev_data <- build_prevalent_time_window(disease_config$var, disease_config$date, years_back)
      counts <- calculate_prevalent_discordant_counts(prev_data, disease_config$name, mz_only = TRUE)
      plot_data <- tw_data$mz |> filter(disease_key == disease_key_name) |> mutate(cases = counts$cases)
      plot <- create_discordant_forest(plot_data, disease_config$name, counts$n_pairs, "MZ Pairs")
      if (!is.null(plot)) {
        display_name <- disease_config$name
        filename <- paste0("forest_mz_pairs_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), ".svg")
        filepath <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "within", window_name, filename)
        save_plot(filepath, plot, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Create CSV tables directory for this time window - within-pair results
  csv_dir_within_prevalent <- file.path(prevalent_disease_base, "within", window_name, "tables")
  dir.create(csv_dir_within_prevalent, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Save CSV for all pairs
  if (!is.null(tw_data$all) && nrow(tw_data$all) > 0) {
    for (disease_name in unique(tw_data$all$disease)) {
      disease_data <- tw_data$all |> filter(disease == disease_name, !is.na(odds_ratio))
      
      if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
      
      tab <- disease_data |>
        mutate(
          use_sci = pmax(abs(odds_ratio), abs(ci_lower), abs(ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
          use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
          or_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
            sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper),
            sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper)),
          Organ_Display = case_when(
            predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
            predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
            TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
          )
        ) |>
        select(Organ = Organ_Display, `OR (95% CI)` = or_formatted, FDR)
      
      disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
      display_name <- if (!is.null(disease_config)) disease_config$name else disease_name
      filename <- paste0("prevalent_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), "_all_pairs.csv")
      write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within_prevalent, filename), row.names = FALSE)
    }
  }
  
  # Save CSV for MZ pairs
  if (!is.null(tw_data$mz) && nrow(tw_data$mz) > 0) {
    for (disease_name in unique(tw_data$mz$disease)) {
      disease_data <- tw_data$mz |> filter(disease == disease_name, !is.na(odds_ratio))
      
      if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
      
      tab <- disease_data |>
        mutate(
          use_sci = pmax(abs(odds_ratio), abs(ci_lower), abs(ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
          use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
          or_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
            sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper),
            sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", odds_ratio, ci_lower, ci_upper)),
          Organ_Display = case_when(
            predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
            predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
            TRUE ~ str_to_title(predictor)
          )
        ) |>
        select(Organ = Organ_Display, `OR (95% CI)` = or_formatted, FDR)
      
      disease_config <- diseases_config[[disease_name]]
      display_name <- if (!is.null(disease_config)) disease_config$name else disease_name
      filename <- paste0("prevalent_", tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), "_mz_pairs.csv")
      write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within_prevalent, filename), row.names = FALSE)
    }
  }
}

cat("\n=== Within-Pair Analysis Complete ===\n")
```

## Within-Pair Difference Analysis for Continuous Outcomes

**Analysis Goal:**
Examine associations between organ ages and continuous outcomes using within-pair difference regression. This approach controls for all shared genetic and environmental factors within twin pairs by regressing the within-pair difference in the outcome on the within-pair difference in organ age.

**Model:** `outcome_diff ~ organ_age_diff` (where differences are calculated within each pair)  
**Method:** Linear regression on within-pair differences  
**Multiple testing:** FDR correction applied across all tests

```{r within_pair_continuous_function}
analyze_continuous_within_pair <- function(predictor_df, outcome_vars = cont_outcomes, mz_only = FALSE) {
  map_dfr(outcome_vars, function(outcome) {
    if (!(outcome %in% names(twins_analysis))) {
      return(tibble(
        outcome = outcome, predictor = NA_character_,
        estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_, z_value = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
        standardized_estimate = NA_real_, standardized_ci_lower = NA_real_, standardized_ci_upper = NA_real_,
        error_message = "Variable not found in dataset"
      ))
    }

    predictors <- setdiff(colnames(predictor_df), "twin_id")

    map_dfr(predictors, function(predictor) {
      # Prepare data with organ age
      analysis_data <- twins_analysis |>
        left_join(predictor_df |> select(twin_id, all_of(predictor)), by = "twin_id") |>
        filter(!is.na(!!sym(outcome)), !is.na(!!sym(predictor)))

      # Handle sex-specific organ ages
      if (predictor == "Ovary") {
        analysis_data <- analysis_data |> filter(sex == 2)
      } else if (predictor == "Prostate") {
        analysis_data <- analysis_data |> filter(sex == 1)
      }

      # Filter to complete pairs
      complete_pairs <- analysis_data |>
        group_by(pair_id) |>
        filter(
          n() == 2,
          if (mz_only) all(bestzyg == 1) else TRUE
        ) |>
        ungroup()

      if (n_distinct(complete_pairs$pair_id) < 3) {
        return(tibble(
          outcome = outcome, predictor = predictor,
          estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_, z_value = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
          standardized_estimate = NA_real_, standardized_ci_lower = NA_real_, standardized_ci_upper = NA_real_,
          error_message = "Insufficient pairs"
        ))
      }

      # Calculate within-pair differences
      pair_diffs <- complete_pairs |>
        group_by(pair_id) |>
        summarise(
          outcome_diff = .data[[outcome]][1] - .data[[outcome]][2],
          predictor_diff = .data[[predictor]][1] - .data[[predictor]][2],
          .groups = "drop"
        ) |>
        filter(!is.na(outcome_diff), !is.na(predictor_diff))

      if (nrow(pair_diffs) < 3) {
        return(tibble(
          outcome = outcome, predictor = predictor,
          estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_, z_value = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
          standardized_estimate = NA_real_, standardized_ci_lower = NA_real_, standardized_ci_upper = NA_real_,
          error_message = "Insufficient pairs after calculating differences"
        ))
      }

      tryCatch({
        # Fit model: outcome_diff ~ predictor_diff
        model <- lm(outcome_diff ~ predictor_diff, data = pair_diffs)
        
        # Extract coefficients (predictor_diff is the second coefficient after intercept)
        estimate <- coef(model)[2]
        std_error <- summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"]
        t_value <- summary(model)$coefficients[2, "t value"]
        p_value <- summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

        # Calculate standardized estimates using SD of differences
        sd_outcome_diff <- sd(pair_diffs$outcome_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
        sd_predictor_diff <- sd(pair_diffs$predictor_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
        standardized_estimate <- estimate * (sd_predictor_diff / sd_outcome_diff)
        standardized_ci_lower <- (estimate - 1.96 * std_error) * (sd_predictor_diff / sd_outcome_diff)
        standardized_ci_upper <- (estimate + 1.96 * std_error) * (sd_predictor_diff / sd_outcome_diff)

        tibble(
          outcome = outcome, predictor = predictor,
          estimate = estimate, std_error = std_error,
          z_value = t_value, p_value = p_value,
          standardized_estimate = standardized_estimate,
          standardized_ci_lower = standardized_ci_lower,
          standardized_ci_upper = standardized_ci_upper,
          error_message = NA_character_
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        tibble(
          outcome = outcome, predictor = predictor,
          estimate = NA_real_, std_error = NA_real_, z_value = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
          standardized_estimate = NA_real_, standardized_ci_lower = NA_real_, standardized_ci_upper = NA_real_,
          error_message = e$message
        )
      })
    })
  }) |>
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "fdr"))
}
```

```{r run_within_pair_continuous_analyses}
# Run within-pair analyses for all continuous outcomes
cont_within_pair_all <- analyze_continuous_within_pair(organ_age_mortality, cont_outcomes, mz_only = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = "linear",
    organ_age_model = "mortality",
    analysis_type = "within_pair",
    pair_type = "all"
  )

cont_within_pair_mz <- analyze_continuous_within_pair(organ_age_mortality, cont_outcomes, mz_only = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = "linear",
    organ_age_model = "mortality",
    analysis_type = "within_pair",
    pair_type = "mz"
  )
```

```{r combine_within_pair_results}
# Combine continuous and binary (smoking/exercise) within-pair results
all_within_pair_all <- bind_rows(
  cont_within_pair_all,
  smoking_within_pair_all,
  exercise_within_pair_all
)

all_within_pair_mz <- bind_rows(
  cont_within_pair_mz,
  smoking_within_pair_mz,
  exercise_within_pair_mz
)
```

```{r within_pair_continuous_heatmaps}
# Prepare heatmap data for within-pair analyses
within_pair_heatmap_data_all <- cont_within_pair_all |>
  filter(is.na(error_message)) |>
  mutate(
    effect_size = standardized_estimate,
    significance = case_when(
      FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    outcome_group = case_when(
      outcome %in% lifestyle_outcomes ~ "Lifestyle",
      outcome %in% clinical_biomarkers ~ "Clinical Biomarkers",
      outcome %in% health_outcomes ~ "Health",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type) |>
  clean_names()

# Add smoking and exercise results to heatmap data - All Pairs
smoking_exercise_heatmap_all <- bind_rows(
  smoking_within_pair_all,
  exercise_within_pair_all
) |>
  filter(is.na(error_message)) |>
  mutate(
    effect_size = standardized_estimate,
    significance = case_when(
      FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    outcome_group = "Lifestyle"
  ) |>
  select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type) |>
  clean_names()

within_pair_heatmap_data_all <- bind_rows(
  within_pair_heatmap_data_all,
  smoking_exercise_heatmap_all
)

within_pair_heatmap_data_mz <- cont_within_pair_mz |>
  filter(is.na(error_message)) |>
  mutate(
    effect_size = standardized_estimate,
    significance = case_when(
      FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    outcome_group = case_when(
      outcome %in% lifestyle_outcomes ~ "Lifestyle",
      outcome %in% clinical_biomarkers ~ "Clinical Biomarkers",
      outcome %in% health_outcomes ~ "Health",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type) |>
  clean_names()

# Add smoking and exercise results to heatmap data - MZ Pairs
smoking_exercise_heatmap_mz <- bind_rows(
  smoking_within_pair_mz,
  exercise_within_pair_mz
) |>
  filter(is.na(error_message)) |>
  mutate(
    effect_size = standardized_estimate,
    significance = case_when(
      FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    outcome_group = "Lifestyle"
  ) |>
  select(outcome, predictor, effect_size, significance, outcome_group, model_type) |>
  clean_names()

within_pair_heatmap_data_mz <- bind_rows(
  within_pair_heatmap_data_mz,
  smoking_exercise_heatmap_mz
)

# Create heatmaps for each group - All Pairs
within_pair_lifestyle_heatmap_all <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_all, "Lifestyle")
within_pair_clinical_heatmap_all <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_all, "Clinical Biomarkers")
within_pair_health_heatmap_all <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_all, "Health")

# Create heatmaps for each group - MZ Pairs
within_pair_lifestyle_heatmap_mz <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_mz, "Lifestyle")
within_pair_clinical_heatmap_mz <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_mz, "Clinical Biomarkers")
within_pair_health_heatmap_mz <- create_group_heatmap(within_pair_heatmap_data_mz, "Health")

# Print heatmaps - All Pairs
print(within_pair_lifestyle_heatmap_all)
print(within_pair_clinical_heatmap_all)
print(within_pair_health_heatmap_all)

# Save heatmaps - All Pairs
save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "all_pairs_lifestyle.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_lifestyle_heatmap_all,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "all_pairs_clinical.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_clinical_heatmap_all,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "all_pairs_health.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_health_heatmap_all,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# Save heatmaps - MZ Pairs
save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "mz_pairs_lifestyle.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_lifestyle_heatmap_mz,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "mz_pairs_clinical.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_clinical_heatmap_mz,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

save_plot(
  filename = file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "heatmap", "mz_pairs_health.svg"),
  plot = within_pair_health_heatmap_mz,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r within_pair_continuous_forest_tables}
# Create output directory
output_dir_within_pair <- file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "forest_table")
dir.create(output_dir_within_pair, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Helper function to create forest table for within-pair results
create_within_pair_forest_table <- function(data, outcome_name, pair_type_label, main_color = "black", n_pairs = NULL) {
  forest_data <- data |>
    filter(outcome == outcome_name, is.na(error_message))

  if (nrow(forest_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  display_name <- case_when(
    outcome_name == "whr" ~ "Waist-Hip Ratio",
    outcome_name == "bmi" ~ "Body Mass Index",
    outcome_name == "edyrs" ~ "Education Years",
    outcome_name == "glucose" ~ "Glucose",
    outcome_name == "triglycerides" ~ "Triglycerides",
    outcome_name == "hba1c" ~ "HbA1c",
    outcome_name == "crp" ~ "C-Reactive Protein",
    outcome_name == "total_hdl_ratio" ~ "Total/HDL Ratio",
    outcome_name == "egfr_cr_cys" ~ "eGFR",
    outcome_name == "fi_10" ~ "Frailty Index",
    outcome_name == "telomere_length" ~ "Telomere Length",
    outcome_name == "eversmok" ~ "Ever Smoked",
    outcome_name == "exercise_how_often" ~ "Exercise Frequency",
    TRUE ~ outcome_name
  )
  
  title <- if (is.null(n_pairs)) {
    paste0(display_name, " - ", pair_type_label)
  } else {
    paste0(display_name, " - ", pair_type_label, " (n = ", n_pairs, " pairs)")
  }

  forest_data <- forest_data |>
    mutate(
      effect_size = standardized_estimate,
      effect_lower = standardized_ci_lower,
      effect_upper = standardized_ci_upper,
      significant = FDR < 0.05,
      errorbar_color = if_else(FDR < 0.05, "grey30", "gray80"),
      Organ_Display = case_when(
        predictor == "Brain" ~ "Brain",
        predictor == "Cardiovascular" ~ "Cardiovascular",
        predictor == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        predictor == "Immune" ~ "Immune",
        predictor == "Liver" ~ "Liver",
        predictor == "Adipose" ~ "Adipose",
        predictor == "Endocrine" ~ "Endocrine",
        predictor == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        predictor == "Lung" ~ "Lung",
        predictor == "Muscle" ~ "Muscle",
        predictor == "Nerve" ~ "Nerve",
        predictor == "Pancreas" ~ "Pancreas",
        predictor == "Skin" ~ "Skin",
        predictor == "Ovary" ~ "Ovary",
        predictor == "Prostate" ~ "Prostate",
        TRUE ~ predictor
      )
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(effect_size)) |>
    mutate(
      y_pos = rev(seq_along(predictor)),
      Organ_Display = factor(Organ_Display, levels = unique(Organ_Display))
    )

  x_min <- min(forest_data$effect_lower, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max <- max(forest_data$effect_upper, na.rm = TRUE)
  pad <- 0.1 * (x_max - x_min)
  x_limits <- c(min(-0.5, x_min - pad), max(0.5, x_max + pad))

  legend_x_left <- x_limits[1] + 0.05 * (x_limits[2] - x_limits[1])
  legend_x_right <- x_limits[1] + 0.55 * (x_limits[2] - x_limits[1])

  tab <- forest_data |>
    transmute(
      y_pos,
      `Organ age` = Organ_Display,
      `Effect Size` = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", effect_size, effect_lower, effect_upper),
      `FDR` = sprintf("%.2e", FDR)
    )

  x_pos <- tibble(col = c("Organ age", "Effect Size", "FDR"), x = c(1.0, 3.5, 6.0))
  table_long <- tab |>
    pivot_longer(-y_pos, names_to = "col", values_to = "val") |>
    left_join(x_pos, by = "col")

  p_table <- ggplot(table_long, aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = val)) +
    geom_text(hjust = c(0, 0, 1)[match(table_long$col, x_pos$col)], size = 3.2) +
    geom_text(
      data = x_pos |> mutate(y_pos = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1),
      aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = col),
      hjust = c(0, 0, 1),
      fontface = "bold",
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      size = 3.3
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, limits = c(0.5, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 7.0), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.1, size = 12),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = unit(c(12, 6, 6, 6), "pt")
    )

  p_forest <- ggplot(forest_data, aes(y = y_pos)) +
    geom_rect(
      aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = y_pos - 0.5, ymax = y_pos + 0.5,
          fill = factor(seq_along(predictor) %% 2)),
      alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "transparent", "1" = "gray95")) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 0.5, yend = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 0.75),
      linetype = "33", color = "grey10", size = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_errorbarh(
      data = forest_data, aes(xmin = effect_lower, xmax = effect_upper, y = y_pos),
      color = forest_data$errorbar_color, height = 0.15, size = 0.6, inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(x = effect_size, color = significant), size = 2.5, shape = 16) +
    annotate(
      "text", x = legend_x_left, y = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5,
      label = "● Significant (FDR < 0.05)", hjust = 0.35, size = 3, color = main_color
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text", x = legend_x_right, y = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5,
      label = "● Non-significant", hjust = -0.65, size = 3, color = "gray80"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = main_color, "FALSE" = "gray80")) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, limits = c(0.2, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    labs(x = "Standardized Effect (95% CI)", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = unit(c(12, 12, 6, 0), "pt"),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  p_table + p_forest + plot_layout(widths = c(2.5, 2))
}

# Create and save forest plots for all continuous outcomes - All Pairs
for (outcome_name in cont_outcomes) {
  plot <- create_within_pair_forest_table(cont_within_pair_all, outcome_name, "All Pairs")

  if (!is.null(plot)) {
    save_plot(
      filename = file.path(output_dir_within_pair, paste0("forest_", outcome_name, "_all_pairs.svg")),
      plot = plot,
      width = 8,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

# Create CSV tables directory for within-pair results
csv_dir_within <- file.path(current_health_base, "within_pair", "tables")
dir.create(csv_dir_within, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Save CSV for all pairs
for (outcome_name in cont_outcomes) {
  outcome_data <- cont_within_pair_all |> 
    filter(outcome == outcome_name, is.na(error_message))
  
  if (nrow(outcome_data) == 0) next
  
  tab <- outcome_data |>
    mutate(
      use_sci = pmax(abs(standardized_estimate), abs(standardized_ci_lower), abs(standardized_ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
      use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
      effect_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
        sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper),
        sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper)),
      Organ_Display = predictor
    ) |>
    select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect Size (95% CI)` = effect_formatted, FDR)
  
  write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within, paste0(outcome_name, "_all_pairs.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}

# Create and save forest plots for all continuous outcomes - MZ Pairs
for (outcome_name in cont_outcomes) {
  plot <- create_within_pair_forest_table(cont_within_pair_mz, outcome_name, "MZ Pairs")

  if (!is.null(plot)) {
    save_plot(
      filename = file.path(output_dir_within_pair, paste0("forest_", outcome_name, "_mz_pairs.svg")),
      plot = plot,
      width = 8,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

# Save CSV for MZ pairs  
for (outcome_name in cont_outcomes) {
  outcome_data <- cont_within_pair_mz |> 
    filter(outcome == outcome_name, is.na(error_message))
  
  if (nrow(outcome_data) == 0) next
  
  tab <- outcome_data |>
    mutate(
      use_sci = pmax(abs(standardized_estimate), abs(standardized_ci_lower), abs(standardized_ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
      use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
      effect_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
        sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper),
        sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper)),
      Organ_Display = predictor
    ) |>
    select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect Size (95% CI)` = effect_formatted, FDR)
  
  write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within, paste0(outcome_name, "_mz_pairs.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r create_binary_within_pair_forest_tables}
# Create forest tables for smoking and exercise using within-pair style
# Save to same directory as continuous outcomes
binary_outcomes_for_forest <- c("eversmok", "exercise_how_often")
binary_pair_counts_all <- c(eversmok = n_smoking_all, exercise_how_often = n_exercise_all)
binary_pair_counts_mz <- c(eversmok = n_smoking_mz, exercise_how_often = n_exercise_mz)

# Create and save forest plots for binary outcomes - All Pairs
for (outcome_name in binary_outcomes_for_forest) {
  plot <- create_within_pair_forest_table(
    all_within_pair_all,
    outcome_name,
    "All Pairs",
    n_pairs = unname(binary_pair_counts_all[[outcome_name]])
  )

  if (!is.null(plot)) {
    save_plot(
      filename = file.path(output_dir_within_pair, paste0("forest_", outcome_name, "_all_pairs.svg")),
      plot = plot,
      width = 8,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

# Create and save forest plots for binary outcomes - MZ Pairs
for (outcome_name in binary_outcomes_for_forest) {
  plot <- create_within_pair_forest_table(
    all_within_pair_mz,
    outcome_name,
    "MZ Pairs",
    n_pairs = unname(binary_pair_counts_mz[[outcome_name]])
  )

  if (!is.null(plot)) {
    save_plot(
      filename = file.path(output_dir_within_pair, paste0("forest_", outcome_name, "_mz_pairs.svg")),
      plot = plot,
      width = 8,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

# Save CSV for binary outcomes - all pairs
for (outcome_name in binary_outcomes_for_forest) {
  outcome_data <- all_within_pair_all |> 
    filter(outcome == outcome_name, is.na(error_message))
  
  if (nrow(outcome_data) == 0) next
  
  tab <- outcome_data |>
    mutate(
      use_sci = pmax(abs(standardized_estimate), abs(standardized_ci_lower), abs(standardized_ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
      use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
      effect_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
        sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper),
        sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper)),
      Organ_Display = predictor
    ) |>
    select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect Size (95% CI)` = effect_formatted, FDR)
  
  write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within, paste0(outcome_name, "_all_pairs.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}

# Save CSV for binary outcomes - MZ pairs
for (outcome_name in binary_outcomes_for_forest) {
  outcome_data <- all_within_pair_mz |> 
    filter(outcome == outcome_name, is.na(error_message))
  
  if (nrow(outcome_data) == 0) next
  
  tab <- outcome_data |>
    mutate(
      use_sci = pmax(abs(standardized_estimate), abs(standardized_ci_lower), abs(standardized_ci_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
      use_sci = if_else(is.na(use_sci), FALSE, use_sci),
      effect_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
        sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper),
        sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", standardized_estimate, standardized_ci_lower, standardized_ci_upper)),
      Organ_Display = predictor
    ) |>
    select(Organ = Organ_Display, `Effect Size (95% CI)` = effect_formatted, FDR)
  
  write.csv(tab, file = file.path(csv_dir_within, paste0(outcome_name, "_mz_pairs.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}
```
